vehicle_yaml:

  description: Engine coolant temperature
  bus: null
- mode: 1
  pid: 17
  name: throttle
  unit: '%'
  description: Throttle position
  bus: null
- mode: 1
  pid: 4
  name: engine_load
  unit: '%'
  description: Calculated engine load
  bus: null
modules: []
